content: Going to give feedback.  I played for 45 days, i metagamed the covenants because it's unclear how they work and you get punished for doing it wrong.  i didn't metagame team comps.  I play xu/thais/aegis/ramona and it's starting to fall off hard for hard missions ch9 or astral ch3.  D-tide can get around 350 without too much strife by 10 teaming lvl2, can lvl 3 a bit.  I think recurring content (p-dive/d-tide/traphase) is done well.  The train event was pretty grindy.  First run took forever.   in the end i was just trying to get all boss kills which is annoying since it's randomized.  Hard mode is just grindy and unfun.  Madness mode i took a look and noped out of that shit (1.5x keyflare/alie requirement and lose half each round iirc).  Main issues for me are 3-fold.  One: character balance: i don't get why Kathigu-Ra exists when she's better than 20 shitty awakeners combined.  I try new comps in d-tide just to learn characters and i just don't really get why so many awakeners are so unplayable.  I don't get why strike and defend don't seem to scale with lvl in a meaningful way.

Two: pull rates: i was pulling for 24 and i missed the 60 pull hit so i have to pull 90 for base copy.  This feels like shit because you need 16 pulls to max out a character and resource acquisition is more subdued at the endgame stage.  This 90 pull pity has happened many times and it's even worse when the awakener and weapon are combined into 1 banner.  I want a more generous pity on first acquisition.  In addition even if i wanted to buy pulls most shop bundles mix good and bad pulls together: nobody wants to pay for the shitty pulls.  Three: notices: on feb 6 they gave a detailed notice about new content on steam which was great.  This month it wasn't that good.  I look to steam for announcements.  No announcements given on steam about Vortice or the new update; i had to look on discord after seeing the in game maintenance announcement in game on the day of.  Not only that the info came out of nowhere: i was pulling for 24 and then i see Kathigu-Ra which i dont have is coming as a banner: if i pulled 24 i would have a pity reset for Kathigu-Ra which would have been devastating.  I want notices to come out as far in advance as possible so people can hoard resources for banners they want.

this is feedback for the 2nd anni raid event.. sorry
general feedback can go in https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1180845276823564288 under the "game suggestions" tag though

I understand this is supposed to be in an another channel. 

But no limited unit needs more than E3 with the only 2 being GDoll and Gmurphy is a stretch wanting 7 copies.

Also strike and Def being low scaling is by design, we gotta heart of the cards this shi. And also they are the only ways to generate our ultimate. So in reality they are as important as your high value cards

But I agree on the steam part. The game really should just upload the images when they post them in discord.


Aight time to see how hard I get slowdowned

Oh only 30s
